endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/agreements
endpoints.description: List marketplace agreements in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/agreements/{publisherId}/offers/{offerId}/plans/{planId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PUBLISHERID}} with a real publisherid. Replace {{PLANID}} with a real planid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/agreements/{publisherId}/offers/{offerId}/plans/{planId}/cancel
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PUBLISHERID}} with a real publisherid. Replace {{PLANID}} with a real planid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/agreements/{publisherId}/offers/{offerId}/plans/{planId}/sign
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PUBLISHERID}} with a real publisherid. Replace {{PLANID}} with a real planid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/offerTypes/{offerType}/publishers/{publisherId}/offers/{offerId}/plans/{planId}/agreements/current
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PLANID}} with a real planid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFERTYPE}} with a real offertype. Replace {{PUBLISHERID}} with a real publisherid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MarketplaceOrdering/offerTypes/{offerType}/publishers/{publisherId}/offers/{offerId}/plans/{planId}/agreements/current
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PLANID}} with a real planid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFERTYPE}} with a real offertype. Replace {{PUBLISHERID}} with a real publisherid.
